The '''Kran''' were a religious order that worshipped [[death]] by spreading destruction during the night. After the Kran arrived on the world of [[Dinutu]] during the [[Clone Wars]], [[Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu]] had them sent to a [[Unidentified binary star system|binary star system]] so they could live out their religion on [[Unidentified hospitable planet|hospitable planet]] where night never fell.<ref name="ShadowsComeKran" />
